recommendations:
Dino Burbidge

There are two ways to write a recommendation for Cat. The first goes something like “I’ve worked with Cat on several projects over many years. Cat it a consummate professional. I’d want her on any and every project I’m involved in.”
The other is something like “Cat is bloody awesome! I’ve asked for things that seemed both unreasonable and impossible and yet Cat delivers. I know that I can phone Cat with a request and she’ll answer the phone… and I know I’ll answer my phone if Cat’s name appears on the screen. It means something interesting is about to happen. She has the gravitas to be an industry leader and he subtly to find solutions where others would self-implode. If you’re re in a fix…or in a party, you want Cat to be there. Cat is bloody awesome!

Sarah Parkes

Catherine is undoubtedly somebody you want to have on your team, hard working, eager to learn and happy to take on new challenges – developing her skills in the process. 
She is excellent at building long-lasting and profitable business relationships and her creative mind brings an abundance of new ideas to client pitches. 
She has a tenacious character and takes full responsibility for the job in hand – always going that extra step to ensure campaigns are delivered on brief.  
Catherine is an asset to any business and very much hope our paths cross again in the future.

Dino Burbidge

There are two ways to write a recommendation for Cat. The first goes something like I’ve worked with Cat on several projects over many years. Cat it a consummate professional. I’d want her on any and every project I’m involved in. The other is something like Cat is bloody awesome! I’ve asked for things that seemed both unreasonable and impossible and yet Cat delivers. I know that I can phone Cat with a request and she’ll answer the phone… and I know I’ll answer my phone if Cat’s name appears on the screen. It means something interesting is about to happen. She has the gravitas to be an industry leader and he subtly to find solutions where others would self-implode. If you’re re in a fix…or in a party, you want Cat to be there. Cat is bloody awesome!
